raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX I paid {$1300.00} using a XXXX Citibank credit card to XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXXXXXX XXXX 

This payment was supposed to fix a " Check Engine '' light on a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. Upon receiving the car, the problem continued the next day. This issue had been repeating for many days without the repair shop being capable of fixing it completely. 

I could no longer trust them nor continue to be without transportation for days. I then contacted the owner, explained the situation but did not meet his commitment to call me back. 

I then disputed the charge with the Citibank, sent Citibank letters and after 3 months and letters explaining my dispute, they sided with the merchant. Despite being a loyal Citibank customer and heavily using the account, they do not value my business, hence this dispute with CFPB for help and guidance. Thank you, XXXX XXXX
